subcodes.first_line: The ocean of inner meanings, flowing forth from the wellspring of the Pen of the All-Merciful, surgeth and courseth through all times. We beseech God that the thirsting ones [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بحر معانی از معین قلم رحمانی در کل احیان جاری و ساریست از حق میطلبیم تشنگان
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @progressive revelation; renewal of religion, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @wisdom [hikmat]
